function.name: search_logs
function.long_description: Searches log files for entries matching a keyword and log severity level.
example_user_queries: Search logs for "database connection timeout" at error level.
Find warning logs containing "memory usage high".
Search for "user login failed" in logs with log level info.
Look up critical logs matching "payment gateway unavailable".
Search logs for query "job scheduler" and log_level debug.
Search warning-level logs for "API rate limit".
Show info logs related to "backup completed".
Search logs for "unauthorized request" at critical severity.
Find debug logs that mention "cache refresh".
